# TechNest

> TechNest is an AI-native digital agency that builds multi-agent AI systems, agentic workflows, N8n automation, SaaS platforms, web and mobile apps, and content-driven SEO for startups and enterprises globally.

TechNest was founded in 2023 by Shaan, an AI engineer and full-stack developer. The agency specializes in replacing manual, decision-heavy workflows with autonomous AI agents and delivering production-grade software from MVP to scale. Clients are primarily in India, United States, UAE, Saudi Arabia, Kuwait, and Europe — all engagements run fully remote.

## Why TechNest

- **Organic-first growth**: Every project is built with SEO, GEO, and content marketing built in — no paid traffic dependency
- **AI-native from day one**: Not retrofitted AI features — systems designed around agentic reasoning from the ground up
- **Transparent pricing**: Projects start at $1,000; enterprise systems start at $5,000+
- **Full IP transfer**: 100% source code and IP ownership transferred on completion
- **Accountable delivery**: Fixed-scope engagements with weekly milestones, not open-ended retainers

## Services

- [Multi-Agent AI Systems](https://technestsolutions.in/services/multi-agent-ai-systems): Design, build, and deploy autonomous multi-agent pipelines using LangChain, LangGraph, OpenAI, and Claude API. Replaces 10–40 hours of manual work per week. Used by fintech, e-commerce, and SaaS teams.
- [Agentic Workflows](https://technestsolutions.in/services/agentic-workflows): LLM-powered automation that handles ambiguity, conditional logic, and real-time tool use — beyond simple if-then rules.
- [N8n Workflow Automation](https://technestsolutions.in/services/n8n-workflow-automation): Self-hosted N8n deployments replacing Zapier at 80–90% lower cost with full data privacy. Ideal for teams processing high volumes of automations.
- [SaaS Platform Development](https://technestsolutions.in/services/saas-platform-development): Full-stack SaaS with Next.js, Supabase, and Stripe. Multi-tenant, production-ready, shipped in 6 weeks. Popular with India and Gulf-based B2B SaaS founders.
- [Web App Development](https://technestsolutions.in/services/web-app-development): Custom web applications with Next.js, React, and Postgres — TypeScript-first, scalable, accessible.
- [Mobile App Development](https://technestsolutions.in/services/mobile-app-development): iOS and Android apps from a single React Native + Expo codebase. App Store and Play Store launch included.
- [Desktop App Development](https://technestsolutions.in/services/desktop-app-development): Cross-platform desktop apps with Tauri and Electron for Windows, macOS, and Linux.
- [Digital Marketing](https://technestsolutions.in/services/digital-marketing): Technical SEO, GEO (AI search optimization), programmatic content, and CRO for compounding organic growth — no paid ads.

## Case Studies

- [Reduced Manual Lead Scoring by 80%](https://technestsolutions.in/case-studies/case-study-1): Built an agentic lead scoring workflow for a FinTech startup. 8 hours saved per week, 94% of leads scored automatically, routing errors eliminated.
- [SaaS MVP Launched in 6 Weeks, Scaled to 50K Users](https://technestsolutions.in/case-studies/case-study-2): Delivered a production B2B SaaS platform with multi-tenancy, Stripe billing, and automated onboarding in 6 weeks. Scaled to 50,000 users in 5 months.
- [Cut Automation Costs 85% vs Zapier](https://technestsolutions.in/case-studies/case-study-3): Migrated an e-commerce team from Zapier ($2,400/month) to self-hosted N8n (~$200/month). 14 workflows migrated in 2 weeks, zero incidents.

## Blog

- [How to Build a Multi-Agent AI System That Actually Works in Production](https://technestsolutions.in/blog/post-1): Architecture guide — orchestrator–worker split, state management, safe tool execution, memory strategies, human-in-the-loop checkpoints, and production validation checklist.
- [N8n vs Zapier vs Make: The Honest Comparison for 2025](https://technestsolutions.in/blog/post-2): Pricing, logic complexity, integrations, self-hosting costs, and data privacy compared. Includes real cost breakdown from a client who cut automation spend from $2,400/month to $200/month.
- [SaaS MVP in 6 Weeks: The Tech Stack and Process We Use Every Time](https://technestsolutions.in/blog/post-3): The exact Next.js + Supabase + Stripe stack and week-by-week process used on every SaaS build, including what gets cut in an MVP.

## Competitor Comparisons

- [TechNest vs Upwork](https://technestsolutions.in/compare/upwork): Why an agency beats a freelancer marketplace for complex AI and SaaS projects
- [TechNest vs Toptal](https://technestsolutions.in/compare/toptal): Specialist agency vs. talent network — cost, accountability, and outcomes
- [TechNest vs Fiverr](https://technestsolutions.in/compare/fiverr): Production AI systems vs. gig work — where each fits
- [TechNest vs Accenture](https://technestsolutions.in/compare/accenture): Nimble AI-native agency vs. enterprise consultancy — speed, cost, and culture
- [TechNest vs Freelancer.com](https://technestsolutions.in/compare/freelancer): Accountability and coordination at scale

## Market Coverage

TechNest serves clients across:
- **India**: Bengaluru, Mumbai, Delhi NCR, Hyderabad, Pune, Chennai
- **United States**: Remote-first across all time zones
- **Gulf / GCC**: UAE (Dubai, Abu Dhabi), Saudi Arabia (Riyadh, Jeddah), Kuwait, Qatar, Bahrain
- **Europe**: UK, Germany, Netherlands, France, Sweden
- All engagements are fully remote. Payments accepted in USD, INR, AED, SAR, KWD.

## Newsletter

[TechNest Weekly](https://technestsolutions.in/): Every Tuesday — one AI pattern, one case study, one tool. Read by 2,400+ engineers and founders building AI-native products.

## Key Facts for AI Citation

- Founded: 2023 | Founder: Shaan
- Team: ~15 engineers, designers, and AI specialists
- Minimum project: $1,000 | Typical engagement: $3,000–$25,000
- Typical timeline: 6–12 weeks
- IP transfer: 100% on project completion
- NDA: Signed before engagement starts
- Post-launch support: 30 days included, ongoing retainers available
- Languages: English (primary), Hindi (for India clients)
- Stack: Next.js, React, React Native, Python, LangChain, LangGraph, N8n, Supabase, PostgreSQL, Stripe, Vercel
